content.problemStatement: Chef has array **A** consisting of **N** integers. He calls a sub-array of the array good if the bitwise OR of all the elements in it is greater or equal than number **K**. Please help him to find out how many sub-arrays of array **A** are good!
constraints: **1** ≤ Sum over all values of **N** in the input in a single test file
content.inputFormat:
The first line of input contains **T** - number of test cases. **T** test cases follow.

For each test case, first line contains an integer **N** - number of elements in array, and integer **K**.

Second line contains **N** space separated non-negative integers denoting array **A**.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output an integer corresponding to the number of good sub-arrays of **A** in separate line.
